overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a dirt path through the countryside of Toussaint, transitioning from dense forest to open fields with historic stone ruins and flowering orchards under a bright blue sky.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest path with swords on his back

entered.detail: Dense tall oak and pine trees forming a canopy over the path
Winding dirt trail with patches of grass and stones
Colorful wildflowers including red poppies and purple lupines lining the path
Distant stone ruins visible through gaps in the trees on the hillside

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a narrow dirt trail through a dense forest with tall trees creating dappled sunlight. Wildflowers line the path and distant stone ruins are barely visible through the trees on the left.

events.description: exits dense forest into open countryside with clear view of hilltop ruins

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking as the landscape opens up to reveal the countryside

entered.detail: Tall thin cypress trees dotting the landscape
Open grassy meadow replacing the dense forest
Distant snow-capped mountain peak visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The forest opens into wide countryside with a clear blue sky. Historic stone ruins sit atop a hill on the left, while cypress trees dot the landscape. A snow-capped mountain becomes visible in the far distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: country path alongside stone perimeter wall

events.description: stone perimeter wall comes into view on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along the path approaching the stone wall and gate structure

entered.detail: Weathered stone wall with terracotta roof tiles running alongside the path
Stone gateposts and ruined archway ahead on the path
White flowering trees beginning to appear on the left side

segments.scene_description: A tall stone perimeter wall appears on the right as Geralt approaches the ruins. The path continues toward a stone gate structure, with flowering trees beginning to appear on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: walled orchard path with flowering trees

events.description: entering area with dense flowering white trees creating canopy effect

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks through the flowering orchard alongside the stone wall

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead on the path in the same direction

entered.detail: Wooden cart or wagon parked on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path enters a beautiful orchard with white flowering trees creating a canopy overhead. Geralt walks past a wooden wagon on the left while the stone wall continues alongside. A distant figure can be seen walking ahead on the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a dense, dappled forest gradually opens into a sun-drenched countryside and a flowering orchard. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow dirt trail through tall trees and wildflowers, where distant stone ruins are only faintly visible through the foliage. As the forest thins, the scene expands into a wide landscape under a clear blue sky, revealing cypress trees and a snow-capped mountain in the far distance. The camera then follows the path toward the historic ruins on a hill, passing a tall stone perimeter wall on the right and the first of many flowering trees on the left. Finally, the path leads through a stone gate and into a lush orchard of white blossoms that form a canopy overhead, passing a wooden wagon as a distant figure walks ahead.
